page.title: Roles
page.subtitle: Manage role templates, role bundles, user-first access assignment, and current access review.
page.placeholder: Role identity/access implementation is not available.

generatedCode.label: System-generated code
generatedCode.description: Leave the manual code override blank and the source system will generate the stable role code after creation.

help.name: Business display role name shown to admins.
help.codeOptional: Use only when preserving a stable operational role key. Codes are uppercase system identifiers, not display names.

templates.previewEmpty: Choose a template to preview generated permissions.
templates.generatedPermissionsHelp: Template permissions are generated as explicit role permissions.
templates.scopePlanHelp: Preview only. Assignment scopes are chosen when assigning a role to a user.
templates.backendAuthority: The source system validates authorization; this preview is not a security guarantee.
templates.permissionsRemainExplicit: Capabilities remain explicit and template notes do not grant access.

scopePicker.backendValidation: Assigned scopes affect access. The source system rejects scopes the current actor cannot grant.
scopePicker.recommendedScopesHelp: Recommended scopes are prefilled from the role template. Adjust them before submitting if this user assignment needs a different scope.

detail.boundaryNotice: A role only describes business capabilities. The role detail page is not where access is assigned or revoked; assignment must use the user-first flow when this capability is available.

update.title: Update role details and delegation bands
update.subtitle: Only role details and delegation-band fields are submitted.

deactivate.title: Deactivate role
deactivate.subtitle: Active assignments or governance blockers may cause the source system to reject this action.

assignToUser.title: Assign role to user
assignToUser.subtitle: Creates a Role-owned assignment record only.

revokeAssignment.title: Revoke role assignment
revokeAssignment.subtitle: The assignment record will be revoked.

placeholders.userSearch: Search users by name or email

referenceHelp.userId: Choose the user account that receives this role assignment.

validation.invalidRulesJson: Assignment rules must use a supported structured rule list.
validation.adminRoleRequiresAdminActor: This role requires an eligible operations account.
validation.selfRoleRequiresStaffActor: This role requires a self-service staff account.

confirm.activate: Activate this role if source-system blockers allow it.
confirm.deactivate: Deactivate this role if there are no source-system blockers.
confirm.archive: Archive this role if there are no source-system blockers.

feedback.assignmentResponseInvalid: Role assignment response was not recognized.

statesView.emptyMessage: Adjust filters or create a role.
statesView.loadErrorMessage: The role surface could not be loaded.

templateCatalog.title: Role template catalog
templateCatalog.subtitle: Source-provided templates; template notes do not grant access by themselves.
templateCatalog.loadErrorMessage: The role template catalog could not be loaded.
templateCatalog.emptyMessage: The source system did not return available role templates.
templateCatalog.sensitiveWarning: This template has a source-system sensitive warning.

catalogGroupHelp.READY_TO_ASSIGN: Source-backed packages that can enter the normal assignment flow.
catalogGroupHelp.REQUIRES_SCOPE_SELECTION: Choose the required scope before previewing the assignment.
catalogGroupHelp.RESTRICTED_SENSITIVE: Sensitive packages are separated for controlled review; M1 does not add approval workflow.
catalogGroupHelp.FUTURE_READINESS: These packages are ready when the corresponding source feature or selector opens.
catalogGroupHelp.SYSTEM_CONTROLLED: The system controls these packages outside the normal operator flow.
catalogGroupHelp.READ_ONLY_AUDIT: Read-only access packages for audit and review.

bundles.sensitiveWarning: This bundle has a source-system sensitive warning.
bundles.loadErrorMessage: The role bundle catalog could not be loaded.
bundles.emptyMessage: The source system did not return available role bundles.

accessAssignment.targetsLoadErrorTitle: Unable to load access assignment data
accessAssignment.userSubtitle: Find a login account linked to an eligible personnel profile.
accessAssignment.userSearchPlaceholder: Search users by name, email, or employee code
accessAssignment.userSearchEmpty: Search users by name, email, or employee code.
accessAssignment.userSearchMinLength: Enter at least 2 characters to search.
accessAssignment.noUserSelected: Choose a user to start assigning access.
accessAssignment.targetSubtitle: Choose an access bundle or role template for an exception case.
accessAssignment.noTargetsMessage: No access bundle or role template can be assigned.
accessAssignment.legacyTargetsHidden: Legacy role templates are not shown as new access targets.
accessAssignment.futureTargetsHidden: Future-ready and system-controlled packages stay outside the normal assignment selector.
accessAssignment.restrictedTargetsHelp: These packages require controlled review in a later workflow and are not selectable in the normal M1 assignment path.
accessAssignment.scopeSubtitle: Choose structured scope from source data. Do not enter manual JSON.
accessAssignment.noScopeMessage: The system checks scope during preview.
accessAssignment.scopeUnavailable: No safe selector is available for this scope type.
accessAssignment.reasonHelp: Enter a reason for control and audit.
accessAssignment.noTargetSelected: Choose an access bundle or role template.
accessAssignment.missingScope: Choose the required scope before previewing.
accessAssignment.unsupportedScope: A scope type has no safe selector.

accountContextStates.reused: The person already meets the required access condition. The system will reuse the existing access state.
accountContextStates.proposed: On confirmation, the system will apply the required access condition for this person.
accountContextStates.blocked: Permission to apply the required access condition is required before this access package can be assigned.
accountContextStates.notRequired: This access package does not require an additional access condition.
accountContextStates.unknown: The preview did not return a supported access condition state; review the conditions before confirming.

responsibilityStates.reused: The system will reuse the existing management responsibility for this access scope.
responsibilityStates.createProposed: On confirmation, the system will create or link the required management responsibility for this scope.
responsibilityStates.blocked: A matching management responsibility or permission to create/link it is required before this access package can be applied.
responsibilityStates.notRequired: This access package does not require a management responsibility assignment.
responsibilityStates.unknown: The preview did not return a supported management responsibility state; review the conditions before confirming.

accessAssignment.resultApplied: The system recorded the access assignment and audit trace.
accessAssignment.resultBlocked: The system did not record changes because blocking conditions remain.

lifecycle.title: Current access
lifecycle.subtitle: Review assignment records, scope, bundle source, and audit before revoking.
lifecycle.emptyMessage: This user has no access assignment records.
lifecycle.confirmSubtitle: Revoke {{role}} if the system confirms the record can still be revoked.
lifecycle.revokeReasonPlaceholder: Example: Personnel moved groups and no longer needs this access.

assignmentTab.unavailableTitle: User-first assignment flow is not available
assignmentTab.unavailableMessage: Access cannot be assigned in this step yet. You can review current access or contact the access owner.
assignmentTab.workflowSubtitle: These steps show the target product direction. Confirmation is disabled because this capability does not yet support recording access assignments.
assignmentTab.departmentFilterValue: Choose a department to find personnel
assignmentTab.departmentFilterHelp: Use this only to filter personnel. It is not the access-grant scope.
assignmentTab.personValue: Choose a personnel profile with a linked login account
assignmentTab.personHelp: Personnel without a linked login account must be linked before access can be assigned.
assignmentTab.modeHelp: Individual roles are only for exceptional cases and still require a reason.
assignmentTab.workspaceValue: Derived from the selected access bundle or role
assignmentTab.workspaceHelp: There is no manual destination selector; the appropriate feature opens after the system applies access.
assignmentTab.currentTalentGroupExample: Live Group A - Mai Anh is currently this group's manager.
assignmentTab.newTalentGroupExample: Live Group C - Mai Anh will be recorded as this group's manager.
assignmentTab.currentOrgUnitExample: Production Department - Mai Anh is currently this department's manager.
assignmentTab.newOrgUnitExample: Content Department - Mai Anh will be recorded as this department's manager.
assignmentTab.previewWorkspaceChange: The system opens the appropriate feature after the required access condition and access take effect.
assignmentTab.previewScopeChange: The person is recorded with the selected management scope if the responsibility source allows it.
assignmentTab.previewCapabilityChange: The person can view and handle work within the scope from the selected access bundle or role.
assignmentTab.sensitiveWarning: Sensitive bundles or roles require a reason, audit trail, and source-system review policy.
assignmentTab.reasonPlaceholder: Example: Appoint Mai Anh to manage Live Group C from 07-2026.

userAccess.selectorSubtitle: Look up current access for each person with a login account.
userAccess.emptyMessage: Choose a person to view the login account, access conditions, and current access.
userAccess.loadErrorMessage: The user's effective access could not be loaded.
userAccess.noAssignmentsMessage: The source system did not return active role assignments.
userAccess.historyUnavailable: The effective-access source has not returned revoke or expiry history.
userAccess.lifecycleReadOnlyHere: Use the access assignment tab; this review surface is read-only.

assignments.title: Access currently linked to this role
assignments.caption: Role assignments
assignments.emptyMessage: No Role-owned assignments match the current filter.
